mission.statement: Community IP's mission is to help underserved inventors obtain intellectual property.
mission.extended: Community IP wants to change the access gap. Started by two patent professionals in 2024, our goal is to help the vast, untapped well of talent by providing intellectual-property support to inventors who are historically underrepresented.
mission.democratize: Community IP works to expand access to intellectual property by offering patent services, education, and mentoring to innovators who might otherwise be unable to afford them — subject to program capacity and when services are confirmed separately.

programs: Raising awareness by hosting events and seminars about IP, specifically for women and younger adults
Mentoring and supporting entrepreneurs and business owners in underrepresented communities

donate.title: Help more inventors get through the first door
donate.intro: Your support helps Community IP expand access to intellectual-property education, mentoring, and patent support for underserved inventors.
donate.spotfundCampaignNote: Community IP wants to change the access gap. Started by two patent professionals in 2024, our goal is to help the vast, untapped well of talent by providing intellectual-property support to inventors who are historically underrepresented.
donate.spotfundClosing: Community IP works to expand access to intellectual property for innovators who might otherwise be unable to afford support — subject to program capacity.

impactItems.title: Education workshops
impactItems.description: Free IP seminars and resources for inventors, students, and community groups.

impactItems.title: Patent support
impactItems.description: Helping qualifying inventors connect with patent guidance and application support where appropriate — subject to capacity and eligibility.

impactItems.title: Mentoring access
impactItems.description: Connecting inventors with volunteer professionals for guidance through the IP journey.

impactItems.title: Program operations
impactItems.description: Intake, events, volunteer coordination, and outreach that help more inventors connect with support.

board.title: Board of Directors
board.intro: Community IP is guided by leaders committed to expanding intellectual property access for underserved inventors and entrepreneurs.
